channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe confirm future captains across all formats @Reuters
item.description: via Reuters #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: GettyImages-2272070136 (1)
item.description: Bangladesh have suffered an injury setback with Mustafizur Rahman ruled out for four weeks due to a grade one tear in his right hamstring and meniscal degeneration in his right knee. The left-arm pacer complained of discomfort while bowling during the opening ODI against Zimbabwe via Icc #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Icc

item.title: Lebo M claims Zimbabweans want to kill him @bulawayo24
item.description: Renowned South African composer Lebo M has sparked widespread debate after claiming that Zimbabweans are trying to kill him over his US$27 million lawsuit against United States-based Zimbabwean comedi... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: ZimStat, National Competitiveness Commission embark on nationwide survey to assess local authorities
item.description: THE Zimbabwe National Statistics Agency (ZimStat), in collaboration with the National Competitiveness Commission (NCC), has begun a nationwide survey that will assess and rank the competitiveness of all 92 local authorities as part of efforts to strengthen governance, improve ser via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Critical gaps in child protection exposed
item.description: RISING levels of violence and abuse against children have sparked urgent calls for Zimbabwe to fortify its social safety nets. Speaking at... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscriptions via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: ZCTU suspends Secretary General Marimo amid chaotic executive meeting
item.description: The Zimbabwe Congress of Trade Unions (ZCTU) has suspended its Secretary General, Tirivanhu Marimo, following a chaotic National Executive Committee meeting on Thursday that descended into heated exchanges amid an escalating leadership dispute. Sources familiar with the proceedin via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: IMF, Zimbabwe reach staff-level agreement on first review of monitoring program
item.description: CGTN The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has announced that it reached a staff-level agreement with Zimbabwe on the first review of its 10-month Staff-Monitored Program, marking a further step in the country’s efforts to restore macroeconomic stability, clear external arrears a via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: AmaZulu release Zimbabwean midfielder Mason Mushore after six months
item.description: South African Premiership side AmaZulu FC have parted ways with Zimbabwean midfielder Mason Mushore, bringing an end to his six-month spell at the club. The 23-year-old joined Usuthu from Highlanders FC in January but struggled to establish himself, failing to make a single Betwa via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Nigeria Advances Ambition to Become Africa’s Next Lithium Powerhouse with Australian-Backed Mining Portfolio
item.description: Nigeria is making significant progress in its bid to establish itself as one of Africa’s leading suppliers of critical minerals after regulators approved the transfer of additional lithium exploration licences to Australian-listed Chariot Corporation. The approvals mark another m via The Zimbabwe Mail #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
